triggerDetected: Modal component calling createDraft instead of updateDraft during edit operations

bugPattern.title: Modal Edit Mode Using Create Instead of Update
bugPattern.description: PostCreatorModal passes editDraft but PostCreator always calls createDraft, causing draft duplication during edit operations
bugPattern.rootCause: Modal component does not distinguish between create and edit modes in its data flow
symptoms: New draft created when editing existing draft
User confusion about which draft is current

modalFlow.code:
<PostCreator
  onPostCreated={onPostCreated}
  initialContent={content}
  mode={editDraft ? 'reply' : 'create'} // Mode set but not used properly
/>

hookBehavior.note: createDraft always creates new draft, updateDraft exists but is never called from PostCreator

failureMechanisms.trigger: User clicks 'Edit Draft' button in DraftManager
failureMechanisms.action: Modal opens with editDraft prop populated
failureMechanisms.expected: Form loads draft data and updates existing draft on save
failureMechanisms.actual: Form loads data but creates new draft on save
failureMechanisms.reason: PostCreator.saveDraft always calls createDraft regardless of mode

stateManagementIssues: Mode prop not utilized in save logic
No draft ID tracking for update operations
Initial content populated but no edit context maintained
Modal re-render key forces PostCreator reinitialization
